title: Cobblemon Phantoms
description: Cobblemon Phantom is a modpack that blends Pokémon-inspired gameplay with Minecraft’s survival and exploration. It features custom creatures, eerie environments, and competitive elements like 1v1 duels, all wrapped in a dark, mysterious aesthetic.
body:
# 🖤 Cobblemon Phantoms 🖤

![COME JOIN TODAY](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df48b8f0a6da63023604d8d8a7a30265d9fcb494_0.webp)


**Step into a world where the heroes have fallen… and the villains now control the region.
Cobblemon Phantom is a dark-themed, story-driven Cobblemon server built for players who want something more than just catching Pokémon — a full villain experience.**

**Whether you want to rise through the ranks of classic Pokémon villain teams, hunt rare Cobblemon, build your base of operations, or dominate the black market… this is your new home.**

_🌀 Features_         
_🟥 Villain Factions (Rank Progression)_

**Join one of the infamous villain teams — Rocket, Plasma, Galactic, Magma, Aqua, Flare, Skull, and more.**       

**Each rank unlocks:**

- Unique prefixes & cosmetic flair

- ⚔️ Cobblemon Exploration & Catching

**A fully modded Cobblemon experience:**

- Wild spawning optimized

- Balanced legendary/rare encounter system

- 💀 Black Market Economy

**Built for strategic players:**

- Dynamic shop prices

- Team-restricted items

- Illegal item traders

- 📜 Server-Wide Story Events

**Seasonal events keep the world alive:**

- Legendary outbreaks

- Villain raids

- Exclusive event rewards & cosmetics

**🎮 Server Type**

- Fabric (1.21.1)

- Multiplayer & community-focused

- Player-friendly staff

- Regular updates & events

**🖤 Why Join?**

- Cobblemon Phantom isn't just "another Cobblemon server."
It’s a villain-run region with:

- A unique progression system

- Immersive lore

- Dark-themed world building

- Missions that matter

- A community built around long-term dedication

- If you’ve ever wanted to play Pokémon from the other side, this is your moment.

 **_⚡ Join the Phantom. Claim your team. Begin your rise._**
